channel.title: Research on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Research on Arrans github.io

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Get answers to your questions, whether they be online or in your own notes. Use online AI models (e.g gpt4) or private, local LLMs (e.g llama3). Self-host locally or use our cloud instance. Access from Obsidian, Emacs, Desktop app, Web or Whatsapp.

item.title: louisfb01/best_AI_papers_2023
item.description: A curated list of the latest breakthroughs in AI (in 2023) by release date with a clear video explanation, link to a more in-depth article, and code.

item.title: neherlab/covid19_scenarios
item.description: Models of COVID-19 outbreak trajectories and hospital demand
